title: Jungle Navigation and Movement
immediate_steps: Travel slowly and deliberately (the jungle is easy to get lost in and full of tripping hazards)
Follow water downstream (streams lead to rivers, rivers lead to civilization)
Use a walking stick to part vegetation and check for snakes before stepping
Check yourself daily for leeches, ticks, and fungal infections
avoid: Do not grab vegetation to pull yourself up (many plants have thorns or venomous insects hiding on them)
Do not sleep directly on the jungle floor (build a raised platform bed)

title: Extracting Water from Vines
immediate_steps: Locate thick, woody vines extending into the canopy
Cut a deep notch high up on the vine, then cut the vine completely off near the ground
Let the clear liquid drip from the bottom cut into your mouth or a container
If the liquid is cloudy, milky, or bitter, discard it immediately (it may be toxic)
avoid: Do not drink from vines with milky or colored sap
Do not cut the bottom first (capillary action will pull the water up into the canopy)
